articles.author: Alexa St. John
articles.title: Europe’s extreme heat would be impossible without climate change, scientists say - AP News
articles.description: The record-breaking heat that’s scorching Europe day and night this month would not have been possible without climate change, according to a new study. The World Weather Attribution rapid study released Friday found that the heat would have been virtually im…
articles.content:
